steps.t: Standing by the banner, you know you will be very exposed when you seek to cross the bridge the Ordâkhai constructed. You should be careful.
You should make your way carefully across the bridge. <rgb=#00FF00>Look</rgb> for threats when you have begun to cross.
You should make your way carefully across the bridge. <rgb=#00FF00>Think</rgb> things over when you have reached the middle of the bridge.
You should make your way carefully across the bridge. <rgb=#00FF00>Listen</rgb> for danger when you have reached the far end of the bridge…
